response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TypeScript/Node.js, testing, and developer tooling, plus recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of shipping production GenAI solutions at scale, building RAG architectures, working with vector databases, or designing AI systems on major cloud platforms — all core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. The customer-facing technical leadership dimension is also underrepresented.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across web, backend, and embedded; strong TS/Node.js depth
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via talks, workshops, courses, and OSS project founding (GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit production GenAI/LLM, RAG, or vector database experience listed
Cloud experience appears limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no evidence of architecting AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure
No clear customer-facing forward-deployed or discovery-session experience with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit GenAI/RAG/vector DB production experience
Current MCP and agentic workflow work at re:cinq
Strong TypeScript/Node.js and software craftsmanship track record
